title: Stefan Knappe
text: Home * People * Stefan Knappe Stefan Knappe during BELCT 2001 [1] Stefan Knappe , a German economist, club chess player [2] and avocational computer chess programmer. He is author of the chess program Matador , which also participated as Lokalmatador [3] at the BELCT 2001 in Berlin . Along with Dieter Bürßner et al., Stefan was member of the ChessCoach - Team , developing chess training software for Palm and Pocket-PC [4] , also affiliated with the Inside Chess project focusing on web development [5] .
